title: Shapath Nilam
subTitle: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu, is raped on their honeymoon. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

title: Sanjhbati
subTitle: An elderly woman struggles with her difficult nature and isolated life. When a new caretaker arrives, their relationship faces challenges, developing into a story about connection and companionship.

title: Munnabhai
subTitle: The leader of a labour union is brutally murdered by a notorious mafia don. However, when the man's son finds out about his father's tragic death, he makes up his mind to avenge him.

title: Bandie
subTitle: Unable to conceive an heir, Maharaja Brajbhan and his wife are forced to abdicate the throne for his cousin, Vikram. Chaos ensues when Vikram learns that the queen is pregnant and decides to kill her.

title: Switzerland
